scripts.build: npm run build:model && npm run build:ml && npm run build:bundle
scripts.test: node scripts/engine-smoke-test.js && node scripts/engine-integration-test.js && node scripts/phash-smoke-test.js && node scripts/warp-smoke-test.js && node scripts/test-adds-scoring.js && node scripts/test-adds-why-edhrec.js && node scripts/test-adds-curve-commander.js && node scripts/test-adds-pool-toggle.js && node scripts/test-adds-token-exclusion.js && node scripts/test-adds-require-role-tag.js && node scripts/test-adds-zero-role-target.js && node scripts/test-deck-plan.js && node scripts/test-deck-cut-matching.js && node scripts/test-deck-planning-persist.js && node scripts/test-collection-wipe-guard.js && node scripts/test-deck-planning-merge.js
scripts.build:watch: npm run build && nodemon --watch js --ext js --exec 'npm run build'
